prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名2021年51→2022年52→2023年55→2024年59→2025年52→2026年49，近年排名稳中有升，2026年进入前50，学校整体实力和认可度持续提升；近年声誉平稳，2023年评价为中性/混合，2024–2026年无重大负面舆情记录；抖音热度排名第94位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；2023年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注），但属个别考生个案，未形成系统性负面冲击；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，两大王牌学科与该校招生专业中的交通运输类、土木工程等高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校强势工科方向匹配；山西省2026年物理类考生167,419人，较2025年173,347人减少约3.4%，考生规模小幅下降；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区；山西省考生跨省报考西南地区工科强校的意愿近年保持稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14075名、2026年缩招约3.8%（计划185→178）、软科排名升至第49位（学校层次提升）以及山西省物理类考生减少约3.4%等多重因素：缩招与排名上升共同推动竞争加剧，位次预计前移；考生减少则部分抵消缩招压力。经综合权衡，预测2026年理科最低位次约13705名，区间13205–14205名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 8069 → 32081 → 11013 → 13719 → 14075, showing a clear backward trend in recent years; in 2022, due to batch merging, an abnormally low point occurred (including Section A1), and from 2023 onward, it recovered to the 11000–14000 range; the 2025 baseline is about 14075, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3000 positions over the past three years; from 2021 to 2025, the science enrollment plan was 178 → 177 → 176 → 180 → 185, increasing to 185 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 178, a reduction of about 3.8% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, from 2021 to 2026, positions were 51 → 52 → 55 → 59 → 52 → 49, showing a steady rise in recent years, entering the top 50 in 2026, with continuously improving overall strength and recognition; reputation has been stable in recent years, with a neutral/mixed evaluation in 2023 and no major negative public opinion records from 2024 to 2026; Douyin popularity ranks 94th (average), with moderate short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (low attention), but it was an individual case and did not form a systematic negative impact; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, and these two flagship disciplines closely correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's strong engineering direction; in 2026, Shanxi Province has 167,419 physics category examinees, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight decline in the examinee pool; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region; the willingness of Shanxi Province examinees to apply across provinces to strong engineering universities in the southwestern region has remained stable in recent years, with no significant changes in regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 14075, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 3.8% (plan 185 → 178), a Soft Science ranking rise to 49th (university level improvement), and a decrease of about 3.4% in Shanxi physics category examinees: the enrollment reduction and ranking rise jointly intensify competition, with rankings expected to move forward; the decrease in examinees partially offsets the enrollment reduction pressure. After comprehensive balancing, the predicted 2026 science lowest ranking is approximately 13705, with a range of 13205–14205.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13205–14205, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Communication Engineering, Automation, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering) as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 13205), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 14205), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing Civil Engineering (A-level discipline) or basic disciplines such as Mathematics/Statistics.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1633 → 1635 → 4565 → 2354 → 2592, showing significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to batch adjustments, an abnormally high ranking of 4565 occurred, while in 2024–2025 it stabilized in the 2300–2600 range; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2592; from 2021 to 2025, the liberal arts enrollment plan was 17 → 16 → 16 → 16 → 14, dropping to 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science main ranking, it rose to 49th in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years, and the overall level and recognition of the school continue to improve; reputation has been stable recently, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with moderate exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (low attention), which was an isolated case; Transportation Engineering A+ and Civil Engineering A are the school's flagship disciplines, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Political Science and Administration, Public Administration, Ideological and Political Education, International Chinese Education, Foreign Language and Literature) have low correlation with the advantageous engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, with a notable decline in examinee scale and significantly reduced competition; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region; the willingness of Shanxi liberal arts examinees to apply for 211 universities in the southwestern region across provinces has remained stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2592, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged (14), a significant reduction of about 25.6% in Shanxi history category examinees (84,879 → 63,113), and the Soft Science ranking rising to 49th: the decrease in examinee scale is the biggest variable; even if the plan remains unchanged, competitive pressure is significantly reduced, and the ranking is expected to shift backward; however, the rise in school ranking partially offsets this effect. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts is approximately 2622, with a range of 2229–3015.
